message:
feat(ui): add scroll progress bar, noise overlay, and spring-driven header

Enhance visual polish across two core layout components:

client-shell.tsx:
- Add gradient scroll progress indicator (sky→violet→emerald) at page
  top using framer-motion useScroll + useSpring for smooth animation
- Add subtle GPU-accelerated noise texture overlay (opacity 0.03) for
  tactile depth across all pages
- Upgrade page transitions from simple y-translate to combined
  scale(0.98) + blur(10px) with per-property easing curves

site-header.tsx:
- Replace manual requestAnimationFrame scroll listener with
  framer-motion useScroll + useTransform + useSpring for continuous
  interpolation of header opacity, blur, padding, and border
- Convert <header> to <motion.header> with inline spring-driven
  style bindings for buttery-smooth shrink-on-scroll behavior
- Add will-change hints for GPU compositing optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
